nodes.name: 新幾內亞高地
nodes.summary: 新幾內亞高地是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联31种鸟类，包括Chestnut forest rail、Archbold's nightjar、Modest tiger parrot等31种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Paradigalla
nodes.summary: Paradigalla（Paradigalla）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联2种鸟类，如Long-tailed paradigalla、Short-tailed paradigalla。

nodes.name: Short-tailed paradigalla
nodes.summary: The short-tailed paradigalla (Paradigalla brevicauda) is a species of bird-of-paradise. Formerly presumed to have been monogamous, it is now considered to breed polygynously. It inhabits the New Guinea Highlands forests. The diet consists mainly of fruits, seeds and insects. The short-tailed paradigalla is evaluated as Least Concern on the IUCN Red List of Threatened Species. It is listed on Appendix II of CITES. Description The short-tailed paradigalla is medium-sized, approximately 23 cm long, stocky black plumaged with slender black bill and bright yellow and blue wattles in front of each eye. The sexes are almost similar in appearance: the female is smaller than the male with a duller plumage and smaller wattles. The short-tailed paradigalla is distinguished from its nearest relative, the long-tailed paradigalla, by its smaller size, shorter tail feathers and lack of red on the wattles. References External links BirdLife Species Factsheet
